description: A background job or export that scans all rows without scoping to a tenant processes or exposes data across tenant boundaries.
body: Failure mode: a batch job, report, or export iterates records globally because tenant context was not propagated into the async work. Detection signals: a job processes rows from multiple tenants in one run; an export contains another tenant's records; the job payload carries no tenant. Do not run tenant-scoped work without a tenant context. Safer fallback: propagate the originating tenant into job payloads and messages, scope every async query by tenant, add negative tests for jobs and exports, and treat any cross-tenant processing as a leak to escalate.
